# Dependencies — Line 1a (Wages from W-2 box 1)

This document covers every output produced by the line 1a computation pass:

| Output | Return field | Location |
|---|---|---|
| `form1040.income.wages` | Form 1040 line 1a | Sum of eligible W-2 box 1 amounts after carve-outs + Form 4852 substitute wages |
| `schedule1.additionalIncome.otherIncomeNonqualifiedDeferredComp` | Schedule 1 line 8t | NQDC / nongovernmental 457 carve-out |
| `schedule1.additionalIncome.otherIncomeWagesWhileIncarcerated` | Schedule 1 line 8u | Inmate wages carve-out |

Blocking flags emitted by this pass are listed at the end.

---

## Output 1: `form1040.income.wages` — Form 1040 Line 1a

### Formula

```
line1a = Σ over all non-statutory W-2s:
           max(0, box1 − nonqualifiedPlansAmount)
         − Σ employmentForm.inmateWagesAmount   (taxpayer; spouse only on non-MFS)
         + form4852-taxpayer.line7aWagesTipsOtherCompensation   (when needsForm4852=true AND substituteFormType=w2)
         + form4852-spouse.line7aWagesTipsOtherCompensation     (same conditions; EXCLUDED on MFS)
```

W-2 entries are summed **without SSN filtering** — both taxpayer and spouse W-2s aggregate into one line 1a total. Result is clamped to `BigDecimal.ZERO` when negative.

### Always-required inputs

| Input | Source form | Firestore path | Field | Notes |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| W-2 box 1 wages | W-2 statement entry | `users/{uid}/w-2/{entryId}` | `wagesTipsOtherCompAmount` | One entry per W-2; null treated as $0 |
| Employee SSN | W-2 statement entry | `users/{uid}/w-2/{entryId}` | `employeeSSN` | **NOT used to filter line 1a** — `computeLine1aWages()` includes every W-2 regardless of SSN. Consumed only by `hasW2ForSsn()` for the missing-W-2 validation gate. |

### Conditionally-required inputs

| Input | Condition | Source form | Field | Effect if absent |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Statutory-employee flag | Always read; gates W-2 out of line 1a if true | W-2 statement entry | `statutoryEmployee` (boolean) | Absent/false → W-2 contributes normally |
| NQDC / nongov 457 amount | Only when box 11 non-zero | W-2 statement entry | `nonqualifiedPlansAmount` | Absent/zero → no carve-out |
| Inmate wages amount (taxpayer) | Only when employment form is present | `employment-income-taxpayer` personal form | `inmateWagesAmount` | UI-derived: the Angular component sums Box 1 of W-2s selected via `inmateWageW2Ids` and writes the total here before save. Backend reads this directly. Absent/zero → no carve-out |
| Inmate W-2 ID selection | UI-only (drives derivation of `inmateWagesAmount`) | `employment-income-taxpayer` / `employment-income-spouse` | `inmateWageW2Ids` (string[]) | **NOT read by backend** |
| Inmate wages amount (spouse) | Non-MFS returns only | `employment-income-spouse` personal form | `inmateWagesAmount` | MFS-guarded |
| Form 4852 substitute wages (taxpayer) | `form4852-taxpayer.needsForm4852 == true` AND substitute form type resolves to W-2 | `form4852-taxpayer` personal form | `line7aWagesTipsOtherCompensation` | Added via `extractForm4852Line1aWages()` after `computeLine1aWages()` |
| Form 4852 substitute wages (spouse) | Non-MFS AND `form4852-spouse.needsForm4852 == true` AND substitute type resolves to W-2 | `form4852-spouse` personal form | `line7aWagesTipsOtherCompensation` | MFS guard excludes spouse Form 4852 |

### Validation inputs (produce blocking flags, not amounts)

| Input | Source form | Field | Blocking flag emitted when |
|---|---|---|---|
| Has employment income (taxpayer) | `employment-income-taxpayer` | `hasEmploymentIncome` (boolean) | `true` AND `householdWork != true` (explicitly false) AND no W-2 with matching SSN AND no Form 4852 substitute → `MISSING_W2_EMPLOYMENT_INCOME_TAXPAYER` |
| Household work flag (taxpayer) | `employment-income-taxpayer` | `householdWork` (boolean) | Suppresses missing-W-2 flag when `true` (line 1b path). UI requires this answered when `hasEmploymentIncome=true` (since 2026-05-05); backend tolerates `null` only for legacy data. |
| Has employment income (spouse) | `employment-income-spouse` | `hasEmploymentIncome` | Same condition → `MISSING_W2_EMPLOYMENT_INCOME_SPOUSE` |
| Household work flag (spouse) | `employment-income-spouse` | `householdWork` | Same suppression for spouse |
| Form 4852 substitute (taxpayer) | `form4852-taxpayer` | `needsForm4852` + `substituteFormType` + `line7aWagesTipsOtherCompensation` | When all three resolve to a non-null Form 4852 W-2 substitute, suppresses `MISSING_W2_EMPLOYMENT_INCOME_TAXPAYER` |
| Form 4852 substitute (spouse) | `form4852-spouse` | Same fields | Same suppression for spouse |

### Absence / missing-data behaviour

| Missing input | Backend behaviour |
|---|---|
| No W-2 entries at all | `form1040.income.wages = null`; blocking flag emitted only when employment-income form indicates income is expected |
| W-2 with `wagesTipsOtherCompAmount` absent | Entry contributes $0 |
| W-2 SSN does not match taxpayer or spouse | **Entry is still included in line 1a** — the SSN mismatch only matters for the missing-W-2 validation gate |
| Carve-outs exceed Box 1 sum | Result clamped to `BigDecimal.ZERO` (locked in by `computesLine1aClampedToZeroWhenCarveOutExceedsBox1`) |

---

## Output 2: `schedule1.additionalIncome.otherIncomeNonqualifiedDeferredComp` — Schedule 1 Line 8t

### Formula

```
line8t = Σ w2.nonqualifiedPlansAmount   (non-statutory W-2s only)
         + otherIncomesTaxpayer.otherIncomeNonqualifiedDeferredComp8t
         + otherIncomesSpouse.otherIncomeNonqualifiedDeferredComp8t
```

Set to `null` (field omitted) when the total is zero. Aggregated via `sumW2Box11Nqdc()` plus per-person Other Incomes form fields.

### Inputs

| Input | Condition | Source form | Field |
|---|---|---|---|
| W-2 box 11 NQDC amount | Per non-statutory W-2 | W-2 statement entry | `nonqualifiedPlansAmount` |
| Non-W-2 NQDC (taxpayer) | Optional; rare non-W-2-sourced NQDC | `other-incomes-taxpayer` personal form | `otherIncomeNonqualifiedDeferredComp8t` |
| Non-W-2 NQDC (spouse) | Optional; only on MFJ | `other-incomes-spouse` personal form | `otherIncomeNonqualifiedDeferredComp8t` |

---

## Output 3: `schedule1.additionalIncome.otherIncomeWagesWhileIncarcerated` — Schedule 1 Line 8u

### Formula

```
line8u = employmentTaxpayer.inmateWagesAmount   (when present)
         + employmentSpouse.inmateWagesAmount    (MFJ only)
         + otherIncomesTaxpayer.otherIncomeWagesWhileIncarcerated8u
         + otherIncomesSpouse.otherIncomeWagesWhileIncarcerated8u
```

`inmateWagesAmount` is read from the **personal employment form**, NOT from individual W-2 entries. The frontend derives this value by summing Box 1 of W-2s selected via `inmateWageW2Ids` before saving the personal form. Backend never reads `inmateWageW2Ids`.

Set to `null` (field omitted) when the total is zero.

### Inputs

| Input | Condition | Source form | Field |
|---|---|---|---|
| Inmate wages (taxpayer) | Personal form present | `employment-income-taxpayer` | `inmateWagesAmount` |
| Inmate wages (spouse) | MFJ only | `employment-income-spouse` | `inmateWagesAmount` |
| Additional non-W-2 inmate wages (taxpayer) | Optional | `other-incomes-taxpayer` | `otherIncomeWagesWhileIncarcerated8u` |
| Additional non-W-2 inmate wages (spouse) | Optional; MFJ only | `other-incomes-spouse` | `otherIncomeWagesWhileIncarcerated8u` |

### Dual-source design (intentional)

| Source | Semantics |
|---|---|
| `employment-income.inmateWagesAmount` (derived from `inmateWageW2Ids`) | Box 1 wages from prison-issued W-2s — subtracted from line 1a (carve-out) and re-routed to line 8u |
| `other-incomes.otherIncomeWagesWhileIncarcerated8u` (manual amount) | Inmate wages NOT reported on any W-2 (commissary cash, payments below W-2 threshold) |

Three-layer defense against double entry: strengthened help text + UI cross-form warning + backend non-blocking `INMATE_WAGES_DUPLICATE_RISK_*` flag.

---

## Blocking Flags Emitted by the Line 1a Pass

| Flag | Condition | Effect |
|---|---|---|
| `MISSING_W2_EMPLOYMENT_INCOME_TAXPAYER` | `employment-income-taxpayer.hasEmploymentIncome == true` AND `householdWork != true` (explicitly false) AND no W-2 has `employeeSSN == taxpayerSSN` AND no Form 4852 substitute | Blocking. Compute proceeds; return cannot be filed |
| `MISSING_W2_EMPLOYMENT_INCOME_SPOUSE` | Same for spouse on MFJ | Blocking |
| `STATUTORY_EMPLOYEE_W2_OUT_OF_SCOPE` | Any W-2 has `statutoryEmployee == true` | Blocking. One flag emitted per statutory W-2; Schedule C out of scope; compute proceeds for other W-2s |
| `INMATE_WAGES_DUPLICATE_RISK_TAXPAYER` | `employment-income-taxpayer.inmateWagesAmount > 0` AND `other-incomes-taxpayer.otherIncomeWagesWhileIncarcerated8u > 0` | **Non-blocking** warning — both sources legitimately add to line 8u (W-2 inmate wages + non-W-2 cash inmate wages). Prompts user to verify no overlap. |
| `INMATE_WAGES_DUPLICATE_RISK_SPOUSE` | Same for spouse | Non-blocking |

---

## Three W-2 sum methods — pick the right one

| Method | Carve-outs applied | Emits flags? | Used by |
|---|---|---|---|
| `computeLine1aWages()` | Yes — excludes statutory employees, subtracts box 11 NQDC, subtracts inmate wages | Yes — `STATUTORY_EMPLOYEE_W2_OUT_OF_SCOPE` | Form 1040 line 1a only |
| `sumW2WagesAfterCarveOuts()` | Same carve-outs | No | Pub 915 SS Worksheet 1 line 3; Form 2441 totalWages; EIC earned income (pre-SSN-filter) |
| `sumW2Wages()` | None — raw sum | No | Only inside SSN-filtered helpers `sumW2WagesForSsn` / `sumW2WagesBySsn` whose callers apply per-person inmate-wage subtraction post-hoc |

Picking the wrong method causes carve-out double-counts (SS worksheet) or improper inclusion of inmate wages in earned income (Form 2441, EIC).

---

## Compute Order

1. **`computeLine1aWages(w2Entries, isMfs, spouseSsn, flags, uid)`** — runs inside `prepare()` before AGI; iterates W-2 entries, applies carve-outs, emits statutory-employee flag.
2. **`extractForm4852Line1aWages(formData)`** — invoked from `buildIncome()` after `computeLine1aWages()` returns; adds Form 4852 substitute wages (MFS-guarded for spouse).
3. **`validateEmploymentIncomeW2ForPerson()`** — emits `MISSING_W2_EMPLOYMENT_INCOME_*` blocking flags (skipped when `householdWork == true` or Form 4852 substitute present).
4. **`sumW2Box11Nqdc()` + Other Incomes** → Schedule 1 line 8t.
5. **`employment-income.inmateWagesAmount` + Other Incomes** → Schedule 1 line 8u.

---

## Cross-line Consistency

- **Cross-line invariant:** `line1a + line8t_w2_portion + line8u_w2_portion == Σ w2.box1 (non-statutory)` — no double-counting.
- Line 1a feeds `form1040.income.line1z` (total wages), which feeds `form1040.income.totalIncome` (line 9).
- Schedule 1 lines 8t and 8u feed `schedule1.additionalIncome.totalOtherIncome`, which feeds Form 1040 line 8 → line 9.
- **Form 4852 substitute wages are added AFTER `computeLine1aWages()`** but BEFORE the field is written to `form1040.income.wages` — so they participate in line 1z, line 9, and AGI normally.
- Statutory-employee W-2s are excluded ENTIRELY (box 1, box 11 NQDC, etc.) — neither line 1a nor lines 8t/8u receive their amounts.
